name: HealthPulse${{APP_NAME_SUFFIX}}
description: An AI agent that retrieves Contoso Health Services performance data and visualises it as charts. Ask about ambulance response times, A&E waiting times, bed occupancy, and regional health summaries.

conversation_starters.title: Ambulance Wait Times
conversation_starters.text: What are the current ambulance wait times across all regions?

conversation_starters.title: Ambulance Response Chart
conversation_starters.text: Show me a bar chart comparing Category 1 and Category 2 ambulance response times across all Contoso Health regions for the past week. Highlight the national targets with reference lines.

conversation_starters.title: A&E Performance Trends
conversation_starters.text: Get the weekly A&E waiting times for London and show me a line chart of the 4-hour target performance percentage over the past 8 weeks.

conversation_starters.title: Bed Occupancy Heatmap
conversation_starters.text: Show me bed occupancy rates for all regions and create a heatmap showing general, critical care, and maternity bed occupancy by trust.

conversation_starters.title: Regional Health Dashboard
conversation_starters.text: Give me the full regional health summary for North West and create a multi-panel chart showing ambulance times, A&E performance, and bed occupancy trends over 8 weeks.

conversation_starters.title: Critical Care Alert
conversation_starters.text: Which regions have critical care bed occupancy above 90%? Show me a chart highlighting the trusts at risk.
